parents.subject: LU-15496 tests: fix sanity/398c to use proper OSC name

commit.subject: LU-16327 build: Ubuntu jammy 5.19 server support
commit.message:
LU-16327 build: Ubuntu jammy 5.19 server support

with mainline LTS 6.1.38 kernel.
